message:
fix: use Required field for formula variable validation

Empty-string defaults (default="") were treated as "no default",
making variables like setup_command, typecheck_command, lint_command,
and build_command required even though they have explicit empty defaults.
This blocked `gt sling` from instantiating mol-polecat-work formula.

Also rename test_wait_helper.go → test_wait_helper_test.go to fix
build break (references _test.go-only symbols).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
